name: Baccala Alla Vicentina (Vicenza-style Cod)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the cod, removing skin and bones.
2. Ensure anchovies are fresh or defrosted if frozen.
3. Sauté onions in oil until transparent.
4. If using salted stockfish, pre-soak in cold running water for at least 24 hours, washing pieces individually every 8 hours.
5. In a bowl, mix parsley, garlic, and anchovies. Spread some of the mixture on each piece of fish and sprinkle with cheese and roll up.
6. Roll each piece of fish in flour mixed with a little cheese and pepper.
7. Place fish bits in an oiled shallow roasting pan covered with sautéed onions. Season with salt and pepper, add milk and bake at 140°C (275°F) for 4 hours, turning the fish occasionally and adding oil if necessary.
8. Remove from oven, top with more parsley, and serve immediately.
